testcase.name: App > renders the application title and connects upon user action
testcase.system-out:
[08:12:13] SUCCESS: Connected to Liferay.
[08:12:13] SUCCESS: WebSocket connected.
testcase.system-err:
[08:12:13] WARNING: Unable to ping web socket.
[MSW] Warning: intercepted a WebSocket connection without a matching event handler:
• ws://localhost:3001/
If you still wish to intercept this unhandled connection, please create an event handler for it. Read more: https://mswjs.io/docs/websocket
Warning: Each child in a list should have a unique "key" prop.
Check the render method of `CommerceCard`. See https://reactjs.org/link/warning-keys for more information. at Option (/Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/node_modules/@clayui/form/lib/esm/Select.js:23:5) at CommerceCard (/Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/client-extensions/ai-commerce-accelerator-frontend/src/components/config/CommerceCard.jsx:15:3) at div at ApplicationConfigPanel (/Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/client-extensions/ai-commerce-accelerator-frontend/src/components/config/ConfigurationPanel.jsx:13:3) at div at div at div at div at div at div at div at AppUI (/Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/client-extensions/ai-commerce-accelerator-frontend/src/App.jsx:74:54) at div at AppProvider (/Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/client-extensions/ai-commerce-accelerator-frontend/src/context/AppContext.jsx:18:3) at AppRoot (/Volumes/SanDisk/repos/liferay-ai-commerce-accelerator/client-extensions/ai-commerce-accelerator-frontend/src/App.jsx:615:28)
[MSW] Warning: intercepted a request without a matching request handler:
• GET http://localhost:3001/api/v1/config/ai
If you still wish to intercept this unhandled request, please create a request handler for it. Read more: https://mswjs.io/docs/http/intercepting-requests

testcase.name: App > updates generation config when AI credentials are missing
testcase.system-out:
[08:12:13] SUCCESS: Connected to Liferay (no AI).
[08:12:13] SUCCESS: WebSocket connected.
testcase.system-err:
[08:12:13] WARNING: Unable to ping web socket.
[MSW] Warning: intercepted a WebSocket connection without a matching event handler:
• ws://localhost:3001/
If you still wish to intercept this unhandled connection, please create an event handler for it. Read more: https://mswjs.io/docs/websocket
[MSW] Warning: intercepted a request without a matching request handler:
• GET http://localhost:3001/api/v1/config/ai
If you still wish to intercept this unhandled request, please create a request handler for it. Read more: https://mswjs.io/docs/http/intercepting-requests

testcase.name: App > renders the main sections
AppContext > provides default config to children
AppContext > updates config via setConfig
AppContext > initializes with provided config
useRealtimeWebSocket > should connect when enabled and microserviceUrl is provided
useRealtimeWebSocket > should handle STARTED event for session
useRealtimeWebSocket > should handle COMPLETED event with partial failures
useRealtimeWebSocket > should hydrate session status on connect if activeSessionId is provided
progressReducer > should return provided state for unknown action
progressReducer > should handle SET_TOTAL
progressReducer > should handle SET_COMPLETED
progressReducer > should handle UPDATE_BATCH and sum correctly
progressReducer > should handle RESET_ALL
Dashboard > renders correctly with progress and logs
Dashboard > shows progress bars for products
Dashboard > triggers onReset when Reset button is clicked
Dashboard > handles export actions
Dashboard > shows empty state when no progress exists
DataGeneratorForm > renders correctly with initial config
DataGeneratorForm > updates product count on change
DataGeneratorForm > shows cost estimation when not in demo mode
DataGeneratorForm > triggers onGenerate on form submission
DataGeneratorForm > disables submit button and shows loading state when generating
